mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM home_visit WHERE visitor_user_id = #{visitorUserId}

SELECT DISTINCT application_id FROM adoption_application aa WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM home_visit hv WHERE hv.application_id = aa.application_id ) AND aa.application_date <= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) AND aa.status = 1 -- 申请状态为待处理
SELECT environment_score, COUNT(*) as count FROM home_visit GROUP BY environment_score ORDER BY environment_score DESC

SELECT hv.*, u1.username as applicant_name, a.name as animal_name, u2.username as visitor_name FROM home_visit hv LEFT JOIN adoption_application aa ON hv.application_id = aa.application_id LEFT JOIN user u1 ON aa.applicant_user_id = u1.user_id LEFT JOIN animal a ON aa.animal_id = a.animal_id LEFT JOIN user u2 ON hv.visitor_user_id = u2.user_id WHERE hv.visit_id = #{visitId}
